problem id: fe6d3aa3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  11011001 -> 10100110
  01011000 -> 10010110
  01110110 -> 01111101
  00001011 -> 10110010
  11111001 -> 10101110
  00010001 -> 00010100
  10110111 -> 01011101
  11010100 -> 01110101
  10111011 -> 10011110
  10101101 -> 11111011

query: 11001001
predicted answer: 10100010
